examples.eng: He was nominated as vice chairman.
examples.ru: Он был назначен на должность вице-председателя.

examples.eng: Our chairman always goes by the rules.
examples.ru: Наш председатель всегда действует по правилам.

examples.eng: Do you always go with the chairman?
Mr Howard was chairman [acted as a chairman]
He was ousted as chairman.
the chairman of the airline company
He was confirmed in his position as chairman.
The chairman ended the meeting at ten o'clock.
The chairman resigned over the financial scandal.
examples.ru: Из-за финансового скандала председатель подал в отставку.

examples.eng: The chairman called on the next speaker.
What's the chairman drivelling about now?
examples.ru: Что за чушь несет наш председатель?

examples.eng: I hope the chairman won't foul things up.
He was severely criticized by the chairman.
People are now calling on the chairman to quit.
We all felt that the chairman had too much power.
examples.ru: Нам всем казалось, что у председателя слишком много власти.

examples.eng: The chairman moves that the meeting be adjourned.
He was designated as Chairman.
It's time I stood down as chairman.
examples.ru: Настал момент, когда я должен был оставить пост председателя.

examples.eng: O'Connell was appointed as chairman.
We elected him chairman of the board.
the longtime chairman of the committee
the chairman's nephew has a lot of pull
Rollings will stay as chairman this year.
examples.ru: В этом году Роллингс останется на посту председателя.

examples.eng: The chairman called the meeting to order.
He rose to become chairman of the company.
examples.ru: Он дорос до поста президента компании.

examples.eng: Is the same chairman still knocking about?
The chairman fidgeted uneasily in his seat.
examples.ru: Председатель беспокойно ёрзал на своём стуле.

examples.eng: Nobody has yet been designateed as chairman.
He has already quit as chairman of the firm.
examples.ru: Он уже оставил пост председателя совета директоров фирмы.

examples.eng: The chairman addressed the board of trustees.
examples.ru: Председатель выступил на заседании Совета попечителей.
